item.title: Trump in video to nation says combat operations against Iran continue at 'full force'

item.title: Iran strike ignites Capitol Hill battle over war powers, Homeland Security funding
item.description: The U.S.-Israel military offensive against Iran is stoking a heated fight on Capitol Hill over who has the power to take the country to war, while als...

item.title: Supporters of Brazil's Bolsonaro rally across Brazil against Lula
item.description: Thousands of supporters of Brazil's former President Jair Bolsonaro demonstrated in cities across the South American nation on Sunday, as organizers h...

item.title: Trump speaks to Middle East leaders, gets briefing on Austin shooting
item.description: President Trump called three leaders in the Middle East on Sunday as he monitors the burgeoning conflict with Iran from his Florida estate, the White ...

item.title: U.S. strikes destroy nine Iranian ships, Trump says
item.description: President Trump on Sunday said U.S. attacks delivered a major blow to Iran's navy.
